foundation: runs the sequencer, RPCs and hosting that keep the chain live
the Cayman wrapper; AEP licensor for Orbit chains
TradFi, capital markets and regional partnerships
grant programs, founder programs, the Developer Guild
Security Council elections, Nova committee, treasury custody
offchain: Nitro, Stylus and the ArbOS upgrades that run Arbitrum
BoLD permissionless validation and the $2M bug bounty
runs the sequencer, the bridge and arbitrum.io
Orbit chain deployments, enterprise and infra partners
maintains Prysm, which runs ~25% of Ethereum nodes
opco: staffs and executes what governance decides
runs the RAD program that pays active voters
the accountability bridge across the Aligned Entities
entropy: the DAO's exclusive strategy firm, turns direction into proposals
holds the ATMC execution seat and proposes allocations
sunsets its own programs and hands them to OpCo
atmc: decides how the DAO's treasury is invested
tokenized US Treasuries via the STEP program
16,000 ETH in yield and staking strategies
idle stablecoins lent out for return
KPK and others run slices of the treasury
agv: the gaming fund is closing; 143.7M ARB back to the treasury
about $10M across 15 positions, now managed by OpCo
securitycouncil: 12 elected signers ready to act on protocol emergencies in hours
9-of-12 threshold to act; discloses after the fact
oat: coordinates with the other Aligned Entities
dao: delegates watch everything hitting Snapshot + Tally, and vote it through
set direction, fund the entities, and hold them accountable
